name: github-docs-api
description: GitHub Docs Expert agent with skills for searching, retrieving, and building upon GitHub documentation via the official GitHub Docs API.

interface.shortDescription: Search, retrieve, and build upon GitHub documentation.
interface.longDescription: Quickly answer questions from GitHub Docs, extract domain knowledge into SME plugins, write API-driven scripts, and keep documentation knowledge current—all via the official GitHub Docs API.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the GitHub Docs Expert to look up information from the GitHub documentation.
